claim_boundary: Watcher transport/lifecycle recovery only; no change to frozen scientific package and no training authorization.
supersession_reasons: V1 could exit after an SSH disconnect following remote tmux creation and lacked a deterministic adoption state machine.
V1 treated launcher rc=0 plus an unvalidated cat of the receipt as PASS; it did not verify the sidecar, content-addressed copy, schema, tests, folds, or no-training fields.
